required_evidence: MAGMA Bonferroni/top100/top50 or FDR05 plus strong donor-level snRNA context.
optional_annotation: TWAS proxy may be shown but is not required and cannot drive group assignment.
notes: Reporting groups are not causal tiers.

group_name: MAGMA + strong snRNA context + multi-SNP TWAS proxy
required_evidence: MAGMA plus strong donor-level snRNA context plus multi-SNP TWAS proxy.
optional_annotation: Spatial supplementary context may be listed only as non-upgrading context.
allowed_claim: Context-mapped candidate with stronger proxy TWAS annotation.
not_allowed_claim: Papilla-specific regulatory evidence or causal gene.
notes: Reporting groups are not causal tiers.

group_name: MAGMA + strong snRNA context + one-SNP TWAS proxy
required_evidence: MAGMA plus strong donor-level snRNA context plus one-SNP TWAS proxy.
optional_annotation: Spatial supplementary context may be listed only as non-upgrading context.
allowed_claim: Context-mapped candidate with weak TWAS proxy annotation.
not_allowed_claim: TWAS-supported regulation or candidate upgrade by one-SNP TWAS alone.
notes: Reporting groups are not causal tiers.

group_name: MAGMA-only or MAGMA + partial snRNA context
required_evidence: MAGMA priority without strong snRNA context, or MAGMA plus partial/moderate snRNA context.
optional_annotation: TWAS non-FDR or spatial context may be shown only as non-upgrading annotation.
not_allowed_claim: Causal gene, validated target, or context-mapped support if snRNA is weak/absent.
notes: Reporting groups are not causal tiers.

required_evidence: TWAS FDR support without MAGMA priority.
optional_annotation: One- or multi-SNP model type must be displayed; not a priority driver.
not_allowed_claim: Candidate priority driver, papilla-specific regulation, or causal evidence.
notes: Reporting groups are not causal tiers.

required_evidence: Existing table genes without sufficient MAGMA/snRNA support, or contextual background genes.
not_allowed_claim: Priority candidate, causal gene, or validated target.
notes: Reporting groups are not causal tiers.
